description: REST API design: resource naming, status-code discipline, pagination/filtering/sorting conventions, versioning strategy, RFC 9457 error format, idempotency, Laravel API Resources. Includes /api-design:review. For designing your own APIs; defers consuming third-party API docs to api-docs-first and Meta/Facebook platform specifics to meta-api.

interface.longDescription:
REST API design: resource naming, status-code discipline, pagination/filtering/sorting conventions, versioning strategy, RFC 9457 error format, idempotency, Laravel API Resources, and a live contract-preview artifact with real example payloads for new endpoints. Includes /api-design:review. For designing your own APIs; defers consuming third-party API docs to api-docs-first and Meta/Facebook platform specifics to meta-api.

Codex fidelity: 1 faithful, 1 degraded, 0 dropped surface(s).
interface.shortDescription: REST API design: resource naming, status-code discipline, pagination/filtering/sorting conventions, versioning strategy, RFC 9457 error format, idempotency, Laravel API Resources. Includes /api-design:review. For designing your own APIs; defers consuming third-party API docs to api-docs-first and Meta/Facebook platform specifics to meta-api.

name: api-design
